text: I wander through a clean and spacious hallway, my reflection caught in the glass. There is an air of order here, a sense of quiet anticipation as if the space is waiting to be filled with people or ideas. The nearby R+D exhibit wall promises innovation, connection, and curiosity. I am drawn to the displays—inviting me to contemplate progress and my own place in the current of research and development. I feel simultaneously like an observer and a participant, poised between detachment and engagement, aware of the hum of potential in this designed environment.
